subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Arise thou to serve the Cause through divine love and the flaming fire of heavenly affection. Today every soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین بمحبت الهی و شعله نار مودت رحمانی بر خدمت امر قیام نما امروز هر نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Christ; Christianity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
